description: Multi-file import fixture (§21.3; the `files` convention). The entry case.scrml imports greet() from a sibling aux helpers.scrml in the SAME case dir; with the aux file present the import resolves (no E-IMPORT-006). Codes-level: the adapter's run() executes only the entry bundle, so the RUNTIME half of cross-file imports is deferred (sibling-bundle loading — see report FRICTION).
rationale: §21.3 cross-file imports auto-gather sibling .scrml modules from the entry's import graph. This proves the `files` convention loads helpers.scrml (without it E-IMPORT-006 fires); the E-IMPORT-*/E-MODULE-* families stay silent. Exercises files + notCodes + notCodePrefixes together.
